attributes.action: do not ban social media under 16s! please sign it.
attributes.additional_details: it also might also cause depression and not going to school. and kids find comfort in social media (also make friends online if they cant/dont want too because of bullying.)
attributes.background: i want the government/parliament to not ban social media under 16 , as it may cause high risk of selfharm and suicide ,

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: 

Do not ban social media for under 16s
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757233
